description: Product Description Unleash your daring side with Charlie red. A dynamic mix of flowers and spicy fruits. The Charlie collection. A fragrance to suit every mood, giving you the confidence to do your thing. Note: Date mentioned on the item is Manufactured date and not the Expiry date Ingredients Butane, Isobutane, Propane, Cyclopentasiloxane, Aluminium Chlorohydrate, C12-15 Alkyl Benzoate, Isopropyl Myristate, Tocopheryl Acetate, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Extract, Hydrogen Peroxide, Disteardimonium Hectorite, Propylene Carbonate, Aqua ((Water) Eau), Parfum (Fragrance), Silica Dimethicone Silylate, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Linalool, Citronellol, Hexyl Cinnamal. Directions Clean and dry the armpit before use. Apply a thin, even layer of deodorant to the armpit. Allow the deodorant to dry completely before putting on clothes. Repeat application if necessary during the day or after physical activity for continuous protection. Safety Warning Keep out of the reach of children.protect from sunlight and do not expose to temperatures exceeding 50 degree c. Keep away from sources of ignition - no smoking.
